title: Slash SaaS Costs: Build Your Own AI CRM with Chinese Models! #shorts
summary: Organizations are reportedly moving away from expensive SaaS products, particularly CRMs, to build proprietary AI-powered alternatives. The shift includes adoption of cost-effective Chinese AI models as part of this transition.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers a shift where organizations replace expensive SaaS tools such as CRMs with custom, AI-powered systems built in house. The relevant driver is cost optimization: Chinese AI models are being adopted as cheaper foundation models to power these replacements. The takeaway is that in-house builds combining workflow automation with lower-cost models are positioned as an alternative to recurring SaaS subscriptions.
